zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Agnes Wentworth於1520年出生在英國素福爾可時，她的父親Thomas Hodgson15歲，母親Margaret Fortescue18歲。她於1541年與John Poley在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1575年8月28日在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴德利享年55歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可巴德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Agnes Wentworth于1520年出生在英国素福爾可时，她的父亲Thomas Hodgson15岁，母亲Margaret Fortescue18岁。她于1541年与John Poley在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1575年8月28日在英国英格兰素福爾可巴德利享年55岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可巴德利。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Agnes Wentworth was born in 1520, in Suffolk, England, her father, Thomas Hodgson, was 15 and her mother, Margaret Fortescue, was 18. She married John Poley in 1541, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 28 August 1575, in Badley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Badley, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Agnes Wentworth est née en 1520, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Hodgson, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fortescue, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé John Poley en 1541, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 août 1575, à Badley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Badley, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Agnes Wentworth 1520 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Hodgson 15 und ihre Mutter Margaret Fortescue 18. Sie hat 1541 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom John Poley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. August 1575 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Badley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Badley, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Agnes Wentworth è nata il nel 1520 nel Suffolk, England, sua padre, Thomas Hodgson, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Margaret Fortescue, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato John Poley nel 1541, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 28 agosto 1575, nel Badley, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Badley, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Agnes Wentworthが1520年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Thomas Hodgsonは15歳，母Margaret Fortescueは18歳であった。1541年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでJohn Poleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1575年8月28日にイギリスイギリススフォルクバドリーで55歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクバドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Agnes Wentworth(이)가 1520년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Hodgson(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Fortescue(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1541년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 John Poley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1575년 8월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 바들리에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 바들리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Agnes Wentworth nasceu em 1520, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Hodgson, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fortescue, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com John Poley em 1541, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1575, em Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Agnes Wentworth родилась в 1520 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Hodgson было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fortescue, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Poley в 1541 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 28 августа 1575 г. в местности бадли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности бадли, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Agnes Wentworth nació en 1520, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Hodgson, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Margaret Fortescue, tenía 18 años. Se casó con John Poley en 1541, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1575, en Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
